provenance.rationale: Sub Project C1 Phase 2 PR 2 — enablement flip (DEC-0124). auto_tuning_enabled false->true after the Gate-2 signoff: PR 1 (the three pre-enablement apply-parked must-fixes + the deterministic loop-closure test, DEC-0123) landed; kill-switch policy = HONOR (apply-parked honors auto_tuning_enabled); the tier_in_hindsight ladder was confirmed as-is by VSC-User. Insert-then-flip supersession of rw-1: only the live config is flipped — SEED_RISK_WEIGHTS stays the immutable rw-1/dark reconciliation + back-test + kill-switch baseline (the ratchet writes the file, never the constant). Reversible: set auto_tuning_enabled=false to re-freeze the entire write surface (ratchet --apply AND apply-parked).
